name: Meat & Vegetable Skillet
recipeIngredient: 10 and 3/4 ounces low-fat cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add chicken, onions, and bell peppers to the skillet. Cook until the chicken is no longer pink and the vegetables are tender.
3. Meanwhile, in a mixing bowl, combine the cream of mushroom soup, skim milk, thyme, and basil.
4. Stir the mixture into the skillet with the chicken, onions, and bell peppers.
5. Add rice and frozen mixed vegetables to the skillet.
6. Cover and simmer for 25 minutes or until heated through, stirring occasionally.
